html:
2026-0236
2026-03-13PCHMuseums ActDesignation of the Director of the Canadian Museum of Immigration at Pier 21Designation of Michele McKenzie of Halifax, Nova Scotia, to act as Director of the Canadian Museum of Immigration at Pier 21, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year, or until she is no longer required to act as Director, whichever occurs first, effective March 18, 2026.N/A
subject: Designation of the Director of the Canadian Museum of Immigration at Pier 21
precis: Designation of Michele McKenzie of Halifax, Nova Scotia, to act as Director of the Canadian Museum of Immigration at Pier 21, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year, or until she is no longer required to act as Director, whichever occurs first, effective March 18, 2026.
